title: elymus alpinus
intro: Elymus alpinus, also known as Blue Wildrye or Alpine Wheatgrass, is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North America. Traditionally, Elymus alpinus has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elymus alpinus include its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Elymus alpinus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
